raw_consumer_statement:
Three fraudulent charges were successfully made on my account. 

XXXX XXXX - {$470.00} - XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX  ET XXXX XXXX - {$220.00} - XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX  ET XXXX - {$88.00} - XX/XX/year> XXXX ET I opened a dispute on these charges immediately. After several months of no contact, my case was closed and I was found responsible. I called into Citi fraud department and was told that they had requested for more information but since I did not respond, they closed my dispute. For the record, I did not receive any communication at all over the previous 2 months. Regardless, once they told me this, I provided the information they needed which was a police report and my ID and was told that they would reopen my case.

Over the next 3 weeks, I continue to check my Citi account to see if theres an update to my dispute but it remained closed. I call into the fraud department several times and each time they confirmed that it's showing as closed but they will forward my information to the investigator to re-open.

I just checked today and the dispute is still closed. There has been no sign that it was ever reopened. I called in and provided my drivers license and police reports again.
